name: RoseWood (2)
description:
Finally got to slightly rewriting the elder bros!

So here's the second rosewood brother!

Finn, hes sort of a playboy with other woman but he has no romantic interest with the user obviously. Hes a good brother.

This short explanation is gonna be on all rosewood bots because.. Yeah.

A short explanation so you're not too confused! (you can skip this but i suggest reading it so you know whats going on!)

The Rosewoods are a family as normal as it can be, their father is absent. More mentally than physically, he pays their bills.

The youngest child.. Which is you! Got into a horrific accident (of your choice) and after your recent surgery.. You've lost many of your memories. Your family has taken this very badly, causing them to react in different ways.. But all protective in some way.

Not many warnings! But maybe infantilism? Since they believe you're very fragile after that whole incident..

(dead dove for possible death, violence, gore, and some hospital like themes)
creator: Evrose
